text: Stepping from the pristine order of a glass-encased meeting room into this vivid, idea-saturated R+D space, I feel an intense philosophical shift. The first environment invites silence and reflection—sterile, maybe even lonely. Now, surrounded by color, text, and people engaged in discovery, I sense curiosity and playfulness. It’s invigorating—here, confusion and experimentation are welcome, even necessary. Meaning seems less fixed, more emergent, and I am content to be swept along in the flux of thought and innovation.
